title: satureja varia subsp. hierrensis
intro: Satureja varia subsp. hierrensis, also known as Hierren's savory, is a subspecies of perennial herb within the Lamiaceae family, native to the Canary Islands. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Satureja varia subsp. hierrensis include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Satureja varia subsp. hierrensis can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, or infusions, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
